goal: Remediate 11 investigation findings across 19 HiveMind skills in 4 dependency-ordered batches, ensuring front-facing agents gain self-awareness, multi-wave dispatch sophistication, granularity enforcement, context window management, and formal stop conditions.

F1_oversized_skills.finding: 5 skills exceed 400 lines (use-hivemind-ideating=500, hivemind-synthesis=486, use-hivemind-delegation=471, hivemind-refactor=460, use-hivemind=432)
F1_oversized_skills.remediation: Extract reference content to references/ directories in Batch 1 and Batch 2

F2_undocumented_skills.finding: 4 skills missing from hiveminder-operation-guidelines.md: hivemind-architecture, hivemind-execution, use-hivemind-ideating, hivemind-synthesis
F2_undocumented_skills.remediation: Batch 4 updates guidelines to include all 19 skills

F3_territory_overlap.finding: hivemind-synthesis overlaps hivemind-codemap on codebase investigation
F3_territory_overlap.remediation: Batch 2 adds explicit territory boundaries to both skills

F4_missing_do_not_use.finding: 9 skills lack 'Do NOT Use For' sections: use-hivemind, use-hivemind-context, use-hivemind-planning, hivemind-refactor, hivemind-patterns, use-hivemind-git-memory, use-hivemind-tdd, use-hivemind-ideating, hivemind-gatekeeping
F4_missing_do_not_use.remediation: Each batch adds/standardizes the section for skills in scope

F5_loc_rule_absent.finding: >500 LOC = never one task rule absent from all skills
F5_loc_rule_absent.remediation: Batch 1 adds to use-hivemind as root policy; propagates to delegation and planning skills

F6_multi_wave_fragmented.finding: Multi-wave dispatch protocol only in use-hivemind; delegation and gatekeeping have zero definitions
F6_multi_wave_fragmented.remediation: Batch 1 adds multi-wave protocol to delegation and context skills

F7_self_awareness_fragmented.finding: Front-agent self-awareness (lineage, phase, progress) exists only in use-hivemind
F7_self_awareness_fragmented.remediation: Batch 1 extracts self-awareness protocol into a reference that all 3 core skills include

F8_context_window_missing.finding: No systematic 200k context window handling or token budget guidance for parallel operations
F8_context_window_missing.remediation: Batch 1 adds context window protocol to use-hivemind; Batch 1 adds token budget to delegation

F9_stop_conditions_missing.finding: Delegation packets lack formal stop_conditions array
F9_stop_conditions_missing.remediation: Batch 1 adds stop_conditions to delegation packet template; Batch 2 adds to gatekeeping

F10_agent_skill_mapping_incomplete.finding: Agent-skill mapping in guidelines missing or incomplete for hivemaker/hitea roles
F10_agent_skill_mapping_incomplete.remediation: Batch 4 updates agent-skill mapping with all agents

F11_voice_inconsistency.finding: use-hivemind-ideating uses third-person; 7 skills use third-person; hivemind-synthesis has mixed voice
F11_voice_inconsistency.remediation: Batch 3 standardizes use-hivemind-ideating to second-person imperative; Batch 2 fixes hivemind-synthesis

batches.title: Core Front-Agent Skills (Entry + Delegation + Context)
batches.rationale: These 3 skills are loaded by every orchestrator session. They are the foundation upon which all other skills depend. Fixing them first means all downstream improvements build on a solid base.

changes.description: Extract 'Orchestrator Mission' core directives (lines 14-65) to references/orchestrator-mandate.md
changes.scope: SKILL.md lines 14-65 → references/orchestrator-mandate.md, add 3-line import reference in SKILL.md

changes.description: Extract 'Multi-Wave Dispatch' detailed wave rules (lines 100-170) to references/multi-wave-protocol.md
changes.scope: SKILL.md lines 100-170 → references/multi-wave-protocol.md, add 3-line import reference

changes.description: Add 'Do NOT Use This For' section after 'When to Activate' with 5 items: (1) single-file reads, (2) code implementation, (3) test execution, (4) direct file editing, (5) any task not requiring multi-agent coordination

Add 'Granularity Enforcement' subsection under 'Core Directives' with: >3 files = break down, >500 LOC = never one task, parallel never for same-domain writes, delegation packet must list exact file scope

Add 'Front-Agent Self-Awareness' subsection with: (1) lineage check — am I main or sub? (2) session depth — how many turns? (3) workflow phase — what stage am I in? (4) completion gauge — what's done vs remaining? (5) context pressure — how much room do I have? Reference the extracted protocol.

Add 'Context Window Budget' subsection with: (1) 200k token ceiling awareness, (2) parallel operation token cost estimate, (3) carry-forward compression ratio guidance, (4) when to stop loading and start delegating

success_criteria: Has 'Do NOT Use This For' section with ≥5 items
Has 'Granularity Enforcement' subsection with >500 LOC rule
references/orchestrator-mandate.md exists and contains extracted content
references/multi-wave-protocol.md exists and contains extracted content
All extracted content referenced from SKILL.md with brief summary + path

changes.description: Extract 'Investigation Swarm Delegation' (lines 268-298) to references/investigation-swarm.md
changes.scope: SKILL.md lines 268-298 → references/investigation-swarm.md, add 3-line import reference

changes.description: Extract 'Hierarchical Consumption' (lines 300-315) to references/hierarchical-consumption.md

Add 'Multi-Wave Dispatch Protocol' section referencing use-hivemind's extracted protocol, with delegation-specific additions: (1) wave-to-wave handoff packet format, (2) wave synthesis checkpoint template, (3) escalation between waves, (4) when to merge waves vs keep separate

Add 'stop_conditions' array to delegation packet template with: (1) scope boundary hit, (2) max files exceeded, (3) out-of-domain detection, (4) context pressure threshold, (5) parent workflow terminated. Each condition has: trigger, action, return_format.
changes.scope: Modify delegation packet template in references/, ~20 lines

changes.description: Add 'Token Budget for Parallel Operations' subsection with: (1) per-agent allocation estimate, (2) parallel dispatch token cost formula, (3) when to reduce batch size, (4) carry-forward compression rules
Add 'Granularity Guard' to delegation rules: (1) >3 files = break into sub-delegations, (2) >500 LOC scope = reject and re-plan, (3) same-domain writes = sequential only

success_criteria: Delegation packet template includes stop_conditions array with ≥5 conditions
Has 'Token Budget for Parallel Operations' subsection

changes.description: Add 'Do NOT Use This For' section with: (1) code implementation, (2) debugging, (3) research, (4) planning, (5) any task beyond context health verification

Add 'Context Window Awareness' subsection: (1) token pressure signals to watch, (2) when context health degrades due to window limits, (3) compaction recovery protocol, (4) carry-forward compression for context verification results
Add 'Session Self-Assessment' subsection: (1) how to determine current session depth, (2) compaction history check, (3) what to include in context probe results for orchestrator handoff

success_criteria: Has 'Do NOT Use This For' section with ≥5 items

delegation_packet.scope: 3 skill files under .opencode/skills/: use-hivemind/SKILL.md, use-hivemind-delegation/SKILL.md, use-hivemind-context/SKILL.md plus new reference files
constraints: Do NOT modify any skill other than the 3 listed
Do NOT change YAML frontmatter
All extracted content must exist in references/ with proper section headers
SKILL.md must reference extracted files with path + 1-line summary
All new sections must follow existing formatting conventions
Use second-person imperative voice throughout

batches.title: Orchestration Skills (Gatekeeping + Planning + Synthesis)
batches.rationale: These skills handle the multi-pass orchestration loop. They need multi-wave awareness, territory boundaries, and formal stop conditions to prevent cascading failures and context rot.

changes.description: Add 'Do NOT Use This For' section (it exists but verify completeness) with: (1) single-pass delegation, (2) domain-specific loops (TDD/debug/refactor own their loops), (3) implementation work, (4) research, (5) planning
changes.scope: Verify existing section is complete, add missing items, ~5 lines

changes.description: Add 'Multi-Wave Gate Protocol' section: (1) gate between investigation waves, (2) gate between research and planning, (3) gate between planning and implementation, (4) how gates compose across waves, (5) escalation from gate failure to wave re-plan

Add 'Stop Conditions for Gate Loops' to loop setup: (1) formal stop_conditions array requirement, (2) minimum 2 conditions per loop, (3) examples by loop type (audit, debug, refactor), (4) what to return when stop condition fires

success_criteria: 'Do NOT Use This For' section has ≥5 items
Loop Setup section includes formal stop_conditions requirement

changes.description: Add 'Do NOT Use This For' section with: (1) code implementation, (2) debugging, (3) investigation/scanning, (4) verification, (5) any task not requiring decomposition into phases

Add 'Granularity Limits' to Decomposition Steps: (1) >500 LOC = never one slice, (2) >5 files = split by concern, (3) cross-surface slices forbidden, (4) each slice must have LOC estimate in its metadata
Add 'Context Window Planning' subsection: (1) estimate token cost per phase, (2) plan decomposition must account for agent context limits, (3) when to plan for sub-delegation vs monolithic delegation

success_criteria: Has 'Do NOT Use This For' section with ≥5 items
Decomposition Steps includes >500 LOC granularity rule

changes.description: Extract 'Domain Bundle 1: Investigation' codebase/session/activity subsections (lines 96-140) to references/investigation-domains.md
Extract 'MCP Tool Usage in Synthesis' (lines 177-210) to references/mcp-tool-catalog.md (merge with existing if present)
Extract 'Claims-Evidence Protocol' (lines 324-370) to references/claims-evidence-framework.md

Add 'Territory Boundary: Synthesis vs Codemap' subsection: (1) hivemind-codemap OWNS: raw scanning, file-level mapping, smell detection, seam discovery; (2) hivemind-synthesis OWNS: multi-source merging, cross-session correlation, evidence grading, compression for handoff; (3) Handoff rule: codemap produces scan output → synthesis consumes and grades; (4) NEVER run synthesis for pure codebase scanning — route to codemap

Fix voice inconsistency: convert all third-person declarations to second-person imperative. Replace 'Synthesis is not assembly...' with 'You are not assembling...'. Replace 'This skill provides...' with 'Use this skill for...'

success_criteria: Has 'Territory Boundary: Synthesis vs Codemap' section with clear ownership table
All text uses second-person imperative voice (no third-person)

delegation_packet.scope: 3 skill files under .opencode/skills/: hivemind-gatekeeping/SKILL.md, use-hivemind-planning/SKILL.md, hivemind-synthesis/SKILL.md plus new reference files
constraints: DEPENDS ON Batch 1 completion — multi-wave protocol and granularity rules must exist first
Do NOT modify any skill other than the 3 listed
Do NOT change YAML frontmatter
Territory boundary must include explicit 'OWNS' and 'DOES NOT OWN' columns
Voice must be second-person imperative throughout

batches.title: Remaining Skills Quality Pass
batches.rationale: These skills need targeted fixes (missing sections, voice fixes, content extraction) but don't block each other. Can be parallelized into sub-groups by change type.

changes.description: Extract Phase 2-3 detailed protocols (brainstorming dialogue rules, MCP tool chaining) to references/brainstorming-pipeline.md and references/cross-stack-research.md
Extract Phase 4 multi-agent review details to references/multi-agent-review.md
Add 'Do NOT Use This For' section with: (1) implementation, (2) debugging, (3) investigation, (4) code review, (5) any task where requirements are already clear and validated
Voice audit: convert all third-person to second-person imperative. 'Meta-skill that turns vague ideas...' → 'You turn vague ideas...'
Extract 'Code Review Integration' section (lines 289-340) to references/code-review-integration.md
Extract 'LSP Integration for Refactoring' (lines 389-430) to references/lsp-refactor-workflows.md
Rename 'You do NOT need this skill for' to 'Do NOT Use This For' for consistency

sub_groups.title: Add Missing 'Do NOT Use For' Sections

changes.description: Add 'Do NOT Use This For' section with: (1) code review, (2) debugging, (3) research, (4) planning, (5) refactoring without tests
Add 'Do NOT Use This For' section with: (1) code implementation, (2) debugging, (3) investigation, (4) TDD, (5) any task not requiring architectural pattern selection
Add 'Do NOT Use This For' section with: (1) code implementation, (2) planning, (3) investigation, (4) TDD, (5) any task not requiring git-based memory persistence

constraints: DEPENDS ON Batch 1 for granularity enforcement conventions

constraints: Read-only — do NOT modify files

batches.title: Guidelines Integration (All 19 Skills)
batches.rationale: The operation guidelines must reflect all 19 skills, updated agent-skill mappings, territory boundaries, and the new quality standards. This is the final integration pass that makes the ecosystem coherent.

changes.description: Expand 'The 15-Skill Ecosystem' to 'The 19-Skill Ecosystem'. Add: hivemind-architecture (Depth: architecture decisions), hivemind-execution (Depth: execution quality gates), use-hivemind-ideating (Domain: ideation pipeline), hivemind-synthesis (Depth: multi-source synthesis + pre-gatekeeping)
changes.scope: Expand tree diagram and description, ~20 lines

changes.description: Add 4 missing skills to Workflow Phase → Skill Mapping table: (1) Ideation → use-hivemind-ideating, (2) Architecture Decisions → hivemind-architecture, (3) Execution Quality → hivemind-execution, (4) Synthesis → hivemind-synthesis

Update Agent → Skill Mapping: (1) hivemaker loads use-hivemind-tdd + hivemind-execution, (2) hitea loads use-hivemind-tdd + hivemind-execution, (3) architect loads hivemind-patterns + hivemind-architecture, (4) hiveq loads hivemind-gatekeeping + hivemind-synthesis (for pre-gatekeeping)
Add 'Territory Boundaries' section with ownership table: (1) hivemind-codemap vs hivemind-synthesis, (2) use-hivemind-ideating vs use-hivemind-planning, (3) hivemind-architecture vs hivemind-patterns

Add 'Front-Agent Mandates' section documenting the user's critical requirements: (1) self-awareness protocol, (2) delegation enforcement, (3) multi-wave sophistication, (4) sequential vs parallel decisions, (5) granularity enforcement (>500 LOC, >3 files rules), (6) how-to-process not how-to-implement, (7) parent governance inclusion
Update verification matrix to include all 19 skills with current line counts from Batch 1-3 outputs
changes.scope: Add 4 new rows, update existing line counts

changes.description: Update quality standards table: (1) change 'SKILL.md under 450 lines' to 'SKILL.md under 400 lines (extract to references/ if exceeding)', (2) add 'Do NOT Use This For' section as mandatory, (3) add 'Territory Boundaries' where applicable, (4) add second-person imperative voice as standard

success_criteria: Workflow Phase → Skill Mapping includes ideation, architecture, execution, synthesis
Agent → Skill Mapping includes hivemaker + hivemind-execution, hitea + hivemind-execution
Has 'Territory Boundaries' section with ≥3 territory pairs
Has 'Front-Agent Mandates' section covering all 7 user requirements
Quality standards updated to 400-line limit and mandatory 'Do NOT Use For'

risks.risk: Content extraction breaks internal cross-references within SKILL.md
risks.mitigation: After extraction, verify all section links in TOC still resolve. Agent must run grep for broken anchors.

risks.risk: Voice audit misses third-person fragments in long skills
risks.mitigation: Batch 3d verification pass includes explicit voice consistency check per skill.

risks.risk: Territory boundaries defined in Batch 2 contradict existing codemap behavior
risks.mitigation: Batch 3c runs AFTER Batch 2 and mirrors the synthesis boundary exactly. Codemap changes reference synthesis output.

risks.risk: Guidelines verification matrix line counts become stale before Batch 4
risks.mitigation: Batch 4 reads actual file line counts (wc -l) rather than trusting plan estimates.

risks.risk: Adding sections pushes skills over line limits, creating recursive extraction needs
risks.mitigation: Estimated targets include buffer. If a skill exceeds 400 lines after additions, agent must extract before adding.

execution_order.note: Batch 2 and Batch 3 (excluding 3c territory) can run in parallel since Batch 3 only depends on Batch 1
Verification pass runs after all Batch 3 modifications complete
